completion_summary: Implemented and release-gate validated a finite-capacity selective sorbent drying model with competitive shared-site equilibrium, capacity-preserving contact kinetics, initial loading and desorption, mechanical retained-liquid and spent-sorbent ledgers, explicit endpoint evaluation, component and volume closure, analytic and SciPy reference checks, WF-00 provider contract, model card, deterministic domain sweep, and a vNext runtime-addition adapter; v0.3 routes and the shared separation proxy remain unchanged.
notes: Independent WF-30 dry slice only. No v0.3 runtime, task maturity, shared routes, concentration implementation, or proxy removal; WF-110 integrates after dry, concentrate, and transfer are reviewed.
scope: Finite-capacity selective sorbent drying model with competitive equilibrium uptake, contact kinetics, explicit retained-liquid and spent-sorbent ledgers, component closure, and a vNext runtime proposal
